_doc: Fixture for / /kb /search /ticket. Mirrors SPEC-02 KB context. TODO(backend): replace with real KB query results.

popular.title: Restoring an in-app purchase
popular.snippet: If a purchase didn't arrive, restore it from Store → Restore.

popular.title: Can't log in after an update
popular.snippet: Clear the login token and re-authenticate with your linked account.

popular.title: How to appeal a device ban
popular.snippet: Submit your SID and the ban reference from the block screen.

popular.title: Game crashes on launch (Android)
popular.snippet: Low-RAM devices: clear cache, free 1.5GB, disable overlays.

popular.title: Season rewards didn't arrive
popular.snippet: Rewards sync at season rollover — allow up to 24h.

messages.author: you
messages.body_html: Bought the Vanguard skin bundle but only got the emote. Order went through on Google Play.

messages.author: staff
messages.body_html: Thanks — I can see the order GPA.3392-1. The skin grant failed on our side; I've re-issued it. Restart the app and it should appear in your locker within a few minutes.
